text:
metamask says this address is malicious. i told you previously the same issue and you ignored it saying it was something else. this is not acceptable. also after clicking on swap button its like the button is stuck. it should say scanning while scanning again and then batch swapping/bridging respectively.

in revoke, it says transactions succesfull but some approvals are still show. its because of timiing issue of confirmed transactions. fix the issues.
